data.body: CHECKPOINT: Implementation complete. Added allowlist bypass to hook_brainstorm_gate() in plugins/dso/hooks/lib/session-misc-functions.sh. Bypass checks for ARTIFACTS_DIR/active-skill-context file and matches against allowlist (fix-bug, debug-everything, sprint, implementation-plan, preplanning, resolve-conflicts, architect-foundation, retro). All 9 tests pass (was 8/9 RED before). All AC verify commands pass. Awaiting commit.
